title: [codereview-pass3-robustness] TDMA spec update in 02a: insufficient detail on SFN wrap (modulo arithmetic for hash/scheduling?), multi-root beacon conflict resolution, interaction with time-provider epoch-floor from 09-packets-timing.md:170, desync recovery state machine, and RPL DODAG version change during join/drift
description: spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:100-170 - Edge cases in long-running mesh or interference-heavy environments not fully specified. Must define state transitions and fallback behaviors for robustness. Third review pass on ve27 chunk 1.
